creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
On Sun, 12 Oct 2008, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of graphics/p5-Image-ExifTool,
>
> Please note that PR ports/128029 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128029

Hi,

Please close this PR -- the p5-Image-ExifTool port tracks only the 
"production versions" of exiftool, and 7.47 is not a production version.

The latest prodction version, 7.50, was released yesterday and I will be 
submitting a new PR for the 7.50 upgrade in the near future.
-- 
Tod McQuillin
